programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: Australia's waterholes are diverse ecosystems.

programme.title: Qatar - Pearls in the Sand
programme.desc: Exploring Qatar's untamed wilderness, unique wildlife and human innovations.

programme.title: Nature's Networks
programme.desc: Explore the complex web of relationships that Earth's biodiversity relies on.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: Sea creatures' tricks for parenthood, predation, survival and adaptation.

programme.title: Wild Tanzania
programme.desc: The hippopotamus and the Nile crocodile coexist in the Tanzanian waterway of East Africa.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on the water worlds of Argentina and its diverse creatures, from anacondas to the great dusky swifts that rule the world's largest waterfall.

programme.title: Europe's Amazon
programme.desc: Embarking on a 750-km journey down the Drava river, starting with the current's Alpine origins to its delta in the Pannonian Basin.

programme.title: Scotland: A Wild Year
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: Vancouver Island is the largest island on the west coast of North America; every inch of the island from its mountains to its forests is connected to the sea and every animal has to find a way to fit into that alliance to survive.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The surprising similarities humans share with whales; Steve goes on an underwater expedition to learn about singing humpbacks, matriarchal sperm whales and playful dolphins and examines how humans early fear of whales eventually turned to wonder.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Discover how scientists are working to restore and protect the Galapagos; witness penguin health checks, tortoise tagging and battles against invasive species, which are building a sustainable future for this delicate, one-of-a-kind ecosystem.

programme.title: Webs & Wings: Nature's Tiny Ballet
programme.desc: Unlock the vital role these feared hunters and spinners play in Earth's ecology.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean: Rhythms of Life
programme.desc: In the waters of the Caribbean, no animal can make it through life without a strategy for survival.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá se niega a vender a Sparky a su jefe y esto hace que el jefe le haga la vida miserable en el trabajo. Timmy y Sparky traman un plan. /Timmy desearía que sus antepasados hubieran elegido diferentes carreras.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy, su padre, y las hadas se atascan en un juego de mesa creado por Cosmo. / Timmy desea que Sparky tenga la oportunidad de ser un héroe. Papá piensa que puede hablar con los animales.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que Sparky sea ser humano. Timmy se convierte en un perro y tiene que convencer a Sparky para que se cambie de nuevo a forma canina. / Timmy desea el Sr. Crocker desapareciera.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá y Crocker hacen un trato. Como resultado, Crocker se convierte en el mejor amigo de Dinkleberg. / Timmy desea hasta 5000 Timmys para el planeta de los papás. Los Timmys secuestran a Cosmo y Wanda.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker intenta desencadenar a Sparky con una palabra secreta. / SuperGato confunde a Sparky con su viejo archienemigo SuperPerro.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá organiza un programa de vigilancia vecinal para atrapar a un ladrón de barrio. / Timmy desearía tener la familia perfecta con el fin de ganar un concurso. Todo el mundo se vuelve loco tratando de ser perfecto.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Amor al primer ladrido / Desesperados sin amas de casa Papá prohíbe a Sparky de salir con la perrita de Dinkleberg. Timmy desea que a Papá le guste la perrita tanto como a Sparky.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy consigue que Jorgen sea despedido. Él ayuda a Jorgen a encontrar un nuevo trabajo. / Sparky hace sus propios bocadillos mágicos para perros. Crocker intenta comprar un millón de ellos con el fin de pedir un deseo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Utilizando el ADN de Timmy, Crocker se hace pasar por Timmy del futuro. / Cosmo pierde su varita y Timmy y sus amigos deben ayudar a encontrarla.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Vicky decide ser actriz y hace que Timmy la ayude a triunfar en su primer papel. / Papá descarga accidentalmente a Timmy y las hadas por el inodoro.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: (Especial de media hora) Finalmente Poof se convierte en un padrino mágico. Es una desgracia para la Sra. Crocker.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: (Especial de media hora) Sr. Crocker se convierte en maestro en la Academia de Hadas y trata de robar toda la magia de los estudiantes! Mientras tanto, Poof está pasando por "poofertad" y finalmente aprendiendo a hablar!

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá lleva a las Ardillas Exploradoras a un campamento y se olvida de todos los suministros. Timmy intenta sacar el máximo provecho de su viaje al contar una colección de cuentos de terror alrededor de una fogata

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cosmo y Wanda llevan a Timmy en un viaje a través del tiempo para conocer a algunos de sus apadrinados del pasado. Pero las cosas toman un giro para lo peor cuando Timmy interactúa con el pasado y altera el futuro!

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Jorgen descubre que Cosmo nunca se graduó de la “Academia de magia”, lo amenaza con quitarle su trabajo como padrino mágico. Para resolver el misterio de lo que sucedió.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Con el fin de poner a un inquieto Poof a dormir, Wanda decide leerle un libro de cuentos de hadas. ¡Solo los "cuentos de hadas" que lee Wanda son los cuentos clásicos, sin embargo, con un toque de "Padrinos Mágicos"!

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando el nuevo bebé de Wanda y Cosmos es secuestrado, el universo entero se prepara para rescatarlo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el día de recoger la basura y Perro no resiste su instinto natural de correr detrás del camión. / Perro quiere ir a Taco Depot, pero lo tienen prohibido.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro corre a la playa y termina contrayendo pulgas. La cura es usar una correa correctiva pero Gato se rehúsa. / Perro se come toda la comida de Gato en un grupo de enfoque de comida, llevando a la creación de comida para Catdog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es noche de luna llena y los instintos de Perro están sumamente disparados por lo que intenta resistir la tentación de correr con el grupo salvaje. / Gato comienza a etiquetar sus pertenencias para evitar que Perro las destruya.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato comienza a entrenar para a enfrentarse a Los Grasosos después de que estos le quitaron su frisbee. / Perro se vuelve apegado a un muñeco de juguete y decide llamarlo Pequeño Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato molesta a Perro por su miedo a las películas de terror, pero luego le empieza a dar miedo a él también. / Cansado de que las cosas no se hagan como él quiere, Gato decide contratar a un cochino para que sea parte de CatDog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En camino a sus vacaciones tropicales, Perro y Gato quedan varados en la mitad de una autopista muy congestionada. / Gato salva a Lube de una pulga, por lo que Lube le promete lealtad a Gato y promete protegerlo de todo mal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito y Gato hacen una fiesta el mismo día, pero todos los invitados, incluyendo a Perro, se van a la fiesta de Tito debido a la mala comida y aburridos juegos que hizo Gato. / Gato entrena a Perro para que corra en una competencia.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Ghost Stories

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: Innovations of War: The Evolution of Tactical Military Weapons

programme.title: Innovations of War: The Evolution of Tactical Military Weapons

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The Sitzkrieg or 'Phony War' of World War II. After Hitler's invasion of Poland, neither the Allies nor the Axis engaged in war for seven months.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The all-important race to develop an atomic bomb. Exclusive interviews with Russian agents detail the inside story of the Soviet atomic spy ring.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.desc: Might an examination of Leonardo Da Vinci's masterful paintings, highly technical hand-drawn sketches, and private journals reveal knowledge of otherworldly technology and extraterrestrial beings?

programme.desc: Was Albert Einstein a genius? Or was he superhuman? Was his genius "of this world," or was it "otherworldly?" Is it possible, as Ancient Astronaut theorists believe, of an extraterrestrial connection to the scientific genius.

programme.desc: The team continue their investigation into Ruthin Castle, as the activity gains momentum one of team is hit hard and has to leave, so the others go in search of whatever is there lurking…all is going well until they find it.

programme.desc: The upper room of the Leopard Inn are now a set of deserted rooms and corridors that were once a Victorian Hotel, although way past its heyday some of the borders seem to have stayed. This episode sees the team get their most convincing evidence to date.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: When auctioneer Dan Dotson calls in sick, his wife Laura is forced to take the reins.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: The Cutting Edge

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic Drama about two misfits who Comedye together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: A reserved Englishman meets attractive American Carrie at a wedding and falls in love with her, but his inability to express his feelings seems to forestall any possibility of relationship - until they meet again and again.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Enterprise starts experiencing effects of the spatial distortions pervading the Delphic Expanse and falls victim to predatory aliens.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: On a mission to investigate an abandoned Xindi vessel on a jungle planet, Archer, Reed and Hoshi succumb to a virus that mutates them into a primal life form.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The NX-01 gets closer to a showdown with the Xindi when Captain Archer takes on an enigmatic passenger: a beautiful slave named Rajiin.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: When Enterprise responds to a distress call from a Vulcan ship stranded in the Delphic Expanse, Archer and his boarding team are attacked by insane zombie-like Vulcans.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer, Reed and Major Hayes infiltrate a Xindi-Sloth industrial colony to learn more about the weapon of mass destruction that will be used against Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.desc: Archer and T'Pol travel back in time to 2004 Detroit to stop a Xindi plot.

programme.desc: Religious zealots hijack Enterprise to use it as a weapon against the enemies of their faith.

programme.desc: An Andorian ship led by Commander Shran arrives in the Delphic Expanse to help Enterprise hone in on the Xindi superweapon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Earth Shocks

programme.title: Destruction Decoded

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: Tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.desc: Chikorita, Cyndaquil, and Totodile find themselves separated from the group and stuck in a ravine! When Meowth finds himself stuck too, an unlikely partnership forms!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Pokémon breeding contest gives our heroes a chance to compete, greet an old friend, and defeat Team Rocket once again!

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma y Jimena llegan a la hacienda y se enteran de la traición de Eva, Fernando y Sara quieren denunciarla a ella y a los Reyes, mientras Gabriela retiene a sus hijas para protegerlas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Se arma una fuerte pelea cuando los Reyes llegan a la hacienda para hablar con Norma y Jimena. Eva se va de la hacienda por orden de Fernando y Raquel le prohíbe que se acerque a su hija Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La envidia termina por separar y enfrentar a los hermanos del Monte. Julieta entra a la casa de Sofía y Paula para destrozarla, sus acciones descontroladas tienen como desenlace el regreso de ellas a la hacienda, pero nadie imagina lo que sucederá.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gustavo sufre un accidente y en brazos de la muerte le revela a José quién es el verdadero padre de Paula. Sofía se siente desconsolada pero, en medio de la tragedia, es abordada por José y le cuenta que lo sabe todo. Los cobradores amenazan a Amador.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José chantajea a Sofía por el secreto de Paula y le pide dinero por su silencio. Él está dispuesto a intrigar a sus hermanos para enfrentarlos con Juan. Paula no puede controlar lo que siente por Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula se dejan llevar por sus pasiones y terminan en la cama, pero él mantiene su intención de firmar el contrato del acuerdo por un año. Sofía es víctima del chantaje de José, que quiere alejar a su hermano de la mujer que desea.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela es una minera que detecta fallas en la seguridad de la mina San Pedro. Antonia, la dueña del lugar, es una despiadada mujer que quiere que su hijo Alejandro se haga cargo del negocio. Gabriela y Alejandro quedan atrapados en un derrumbe.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro y Gabriela son rescatados por Tomás. El padre de la minera ahora está rico y no quiere que ella se arriesgue más en la mina. Alejandro se queda en San Pedro, visita a Gabriela y la ve saliendo de la ducha, provocando los celos de Fernando.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Tomás entrega su renuncia, pero antes, como jefe de los mineros, despide a Gabriela para evitar que muera en otro derrumbe. Ella vuelve a la mina y le pide su trabajo de vuelta a Alejandro. Él acepta, sin poder disimular lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia interroga al pequeño David para saber quién es su padre. Además, quiere investigar si el Tigre ha estado robando oro de su mina. Fernando tiene una horrible pesadilla en la que ve a su madre, la Patrona, asesinando a su padre, Marcos Beltrán.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Jimmy Batten
programme.desc: On November 12th, 1982 Roberto Duran faced Jimmy Batten at the Orange Bowl in Miami, Fl. It ended in an unanimous decision victory for Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Sugar Ray Leonard 1
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1989 Roberto Duran and Sugar Ray Leonard fought for the first time for the WBC World Super Middleweight at the Mirage Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Leonard.

programme.title: Roman Gonzalez vs. Juan Francisco Estrada 1
programme.desc: On November 17th, 2012, Roman Gonzalez fought Juan Francisco Estrada for the WBA World Light Flyweight Title at the Sports Arena in Los Angeles. In a successful title defense fight, Gonzalez earned the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Ryota Murata vs Rob Brant 2
programme.desc: On July 12th, 2019 Ryota Murata participated in a rematch with Rob Brant for the WBA World Middleweight title at the EDION Arena Osaka in Japan resulting in a second round knockout securing the win for Murata.

programme.title: Sean O'Grady vs Hilmer Kenty
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1981 Sean O'Grady battled Hilmer Kenty for the WBA World Lightweight title at Ballys Park Place Hotel Casino in Atlantic City the 15 round bout ended in a unannimous decision win for O'Grady.

programme.title: Sergio Martinez vs Julio Cesar Chavez Jr
programme.desc: On September 15th, 2012, Sergio Martinez fought Julio Cesar Chavez Jr for the WBC Middleweight Title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. Despite an incredible effort from Chavez Jr in the final round, Martinez survived and won by decision.

programme.title: Sergio Martinez vs Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: On April 17th, 2010, Sergio Martinez fought Kelly Pavlik for the World Middleweight Championship at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City. Showing his confidence, Martinez put on the pressure and found his range, earning an unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Lenny Zappavigna
programme.desc: On June 30th, 2018 Alex Saucedo fought Lenny Zappavigna for the vacant WBO International Super lightweight title.

programme.title: Alexis Arguello vs Ray Mancini
programme.desc: On October 3rd, 1981, Alexis Arguello fought Ray Mancini for the WBC Lightweight Championship in Atlantic City, in a very close and exciting fight.

programme.title: Devin Haney vs Rafael Vazquez
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Devin Haney and Rafael Vazquez fought eachother at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 4 rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Haney.

programme.title: Donald Curry vs Milton McCrory
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1985, Donald Curry fought Milton McCrory for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Welterweight Titles in Las Vegas. Putting on the pressure early, Donald Curry came out firing, knocking out McCrory in the second round.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs In Jin Chi
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001, Erik Morales fought In Jin Chi for the WBC Featherweight Title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles. Defending his title, Erik Morales put on the pressure to do enough to get the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2004 Floyd Mayweather fought DeMarcus Corley at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Light Welterweight Title eliminator with Corely going down in round 8 and round 10 resulting in a win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Giovani Santillan vs Angel Ruiz
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021 Giovani Santillan and Angel Ruiz fought eachother in a 10 round bout at the Pechanga Arena in San Diego resulting in a victory for Santillan.

programme.title: James Toney vs Charles Williams
programme.desc: On July 29th, 1994 James Toney and Charles Williams battled eachother for IBF World Super Middleweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a knockout victory for James Toney.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Dedicated to her ambition of never quitting, Stephy Slays demonstrates perseverance in an extraordinary match against The Disciplinarian. The smart ending will be unforgettable. Meanwhile, Tessa Blanchard takes her biggest risk since joining WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard is the new WOW World Champion, and The Beast, Jungle Grrrl, and Havok The Monster Of Madness have lined up to challenge the Champion. A Triple Threat Number One Contender Match will decide who will wrestle Tessa Blanchard.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard seemingly conspires with World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez to handpick her Championship opponent ...WOW’s newest competitor, Mexico’s high flying Luchadora Serpentine.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Foes Jungle Grrrl and The Beast are forced to put aside their differences to battle The Monsters of Madness, Havok, and Hazard. Can the two animals of the ring coexist long enough to secure victory? The Tag Team Championship Series continues.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The animals of the ring, The Beast and Jungle Grrrl battle to determine dominance. Meanwhile, WOW World Champion Tessa Blanchard seizes an opportunity to settle a score.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: After months of being bullied, Stephy Slays finally gets her shot at revenge against The Governor’s Daughter, Abilene Maverick. The Tag Team Championship continues when The Monsters of Madness battle The Dixie Darlings, Jolene, and Jolynn.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Champion Tessa Blanchard and The Greatest Attorney in the World, Sophia Lopez conspire In an attempt to derail The Beast’s path to The WOW World Championship Title by placing The Norweigen Nightmare, Nikki Krampus in her way.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Anticipation builds as Jungle Grrrl gets a rematch against The Beast to determine the rightful contender to the WOW World Championship. To ensure a fair outcome, Champion Tessa Blanchard has been barred from ringside.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Jungle Grrrl calls out The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for her Championship Match. With her back against the well, Tessa is forced to get creative and strikes a deal with The Fabulous Lana Star. Will The Fabulous One help Tessa Blanchard or turn on her?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast calls out The Fabulous Lana Star for costing her a shot at The WOW World Championship. And Jungle Grrrl finally battles The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for the WOW World Championship in The Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Chaos, disorder, bedlam, and madness are all promised in a high-stakes Three-Way Elimination between The Monsters of Madness, Havok and Hazard, Holidead and Siren The Voodoo Doll, & Adrenaline and Fire.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: It’s The Monsters of Madness vs. Adrenaline and Fire. Both teams will test their metal. In the end, only one will claim victory as The WOW Tag Team Champions of the World! Will speed overcome power and strength? Or will size dominate the underdogs?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Since day one when Abilene Maverick 'accidentally' poured tea on Stephy Slays, Stephy has endured Abilene’s teasing and bullying. After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Daggett, the Black Marshal from Deadwood, moves to Tombstone to settle down and raise chickens after an injury that leaves him defenseless. When two gunslingers ride into town looking for the ex-Marshal, he and Hollister face down the 'guns.'

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) captures murderer Milo Wade in a border town. He starts the cross-desert trek to Tombstone with his prisoner, but Milo's young brother intercepts the pair, leaving Hollister tied to a tree to die in the broiling sun.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister gives the job of the jailer to Barton Clark who has recently come West. The Sheriff brings Clark his first 'tenant,' a beautiful outlaw known as Rose of Rio Bravo with whom Clark falls in love, leading him to double-cross Hollister.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister rides to collect a prisoner, but the prisoner breaks jail before he arrives. The prisoner saves Hollister from an Apache ambush. But soon Hollister must pit his courage and fast gun against two desperate men.

programme.desc: iWill Date Freddie: An iCarly fan, Valerie, asks Freddie on a date. The date goes so well that Freddie begins filming Valerie's own web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHeart Art: Carly invites Spencer's art hero, Harry Joyner, to take a look at Spencer's work. When Harry calls Spencer's work amateurish, Spencer feels like his life has lost its purpose.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iAm Your Biggest Fan: iCarly's biggest fan, Mandy, is invited onto the show as a one-girl studio audience. Mandy turns out to be more of a stalker than a fan and the kids have to get rid of her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iSaw Him First: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iOwe You: Sam is insulted when Freddie accuses her of not paying him and Carly back any of the money she's constantly borrowing.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHurt Lewbert: A "Messing With Lewbert" sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPie: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iKiss: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iGive Away a Car: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iMeet Fred: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie offend an internet video sensation named Fred, he tries to convince his viewers to never watch iCarly again.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iLook Alike: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they're still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iGo Nuclear: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie get an assignment at school to create an original project that benefits the environment, Carly ends up building an illegal nuclear-powered generator!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly's old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly's best friend.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie lose the iCarly URL to Nevel, he demands Carly kiss him if she wants their URL back. Meanwhile, Spencer has fun with the two hundred pillows he accidentally ordered.
